nodes.name: 白腹鹃鵙
nodes.summary: 白腹鹃鵙（学名：Coracina papuensis）是山椒鸟科鸦鹃鵙属的一种，分布于澳大利亚、印度尼西亚、巴布亚新几内亚和所罗门群岛。其自然栖息地为亚热带或热带的湿润低地森林、亚热带或热带的红树林以及亚热带或热带的湿润山地林。 参考文献 BirdLife International. Coracina papuensis. The IUCN Red List of Threatened Species 2009. [2010-10-26] （英语）. 外部链接 ABID Images On the HBW Internet Bird Collection
nodes.shortSummary: 白腹鹃鵙（学名：Coracina papuensis）是山椒鸟科鸦鹃鵙属的一种，分布于澳大利亚、印度尼西亚、巴布亚新几内亚和所罗门群岛。其自然栖息地为亚热带或热带的湿润低地森林、亚热带或热带的红树林以及亚热带或热带的湿润山地林。 参考文献 BirdLife Internatio…

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: In Indonesia the white-bellied cuckooshrike is commonly found in the northern Moluccas and occasionally found in Eastern Wallacea. The white-bellied cuckooshrike thrives in many different habitats and vegetation types including, savanna, woodlands, Eucalyptus forests, riparian forest, rainforest, littoral forest, river redgum bushland, mangroves, open grasslands, coconut plantations, farmlands, and suburban gardens. It prefers lower-lying and forested habitats mainly below 800 m asl. They are predominantly sedentary or locally nomadic; however, the subspecies C
